/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 35: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: Task1 is a subcomponent in node_a.impl, not a visible entity in Task.impl_1; Dispatch_Protocol is an AADL property of Task.impl_1, but referenced via non-existent Task1. -> Replace 'Task1.Dispatch_Protocol = Periodic' with 'Dispatch_Protocol = Periodic'
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 35: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Periodic'.: Periodic is an AADL enumeration value defined in ARINC653, not directly visible in AGREE without proper scope; AGREE must reference it as a literal without qualification since it's bound to the property. -> Keep 'Periodic' as-is; it is a valid literal in context of Dispatch_Protocol property
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 35: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Task1'.: Task1 is a subcomponent of node_a.impl, not visible within Task.impl_1's annex scope. AGREE annex on Task.impl_1 must reference its own properties directly. -> Remove all 'Task1.' prefixes from all guarantee expressions
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 35: Guarantee statements are allowed only in component types: The annex is attached to Task.impl_1 (an implementation), but AGREE guarantees must be declared in the component type (Task) to be valid in contract scope. -> Move the entire annex block from Task.impl_1 to its type declaration (Task)
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 36: extraneous input 'ms' expecting ';': AGREE does not natively parse AADL units like 'ms' in literals; unit must be removed and value expressed in scalar real (100.0). -> Change '100.0 ms' to '100.0'
